title: Quick Login via Demo Account Button

actions.instruction: Click the "Admin User" quick access demo account button
actions.description: Click the 'Admin User' quick access demo account button

actions.instruction: Wait for the form to auto-fill with demo credentials
actions.description: Wait for demo credentials to auto-fill

actions.instruction: Observe the form submits automatically or wait for redirect
actions.description: Wait for automatic login or redirect to homepage

actions.instruction: Verify the user is logged in and redirected to the dashboard
actions.description: Navigate to the homepage to verify login and redirection
